prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical beach portrait of a graceful South Asian woman sitting alone on pale sand beside turquoise ocean waves under bright white midday sunlight. She wears an elegant cream traditional sari with premium silk texture, subtle gold embroidery, ornate border detailing, and a matching short-sleeved blouse. She has long flowing dark brown wavy hair and a delicate floral crown made of small white baby's-breath flowers with soft blush pink accents. Pose her seated in a relaxed side-facing position with the sari draped across her lap, one arm resting across her knees and one hand gently placed near the sand, conveying serene romantic elegance. The background shows a calm tropical shoreline with foamy waves, a blue-green sea, a clear pale blue sky, and distant rocky cliffs softly blurred by shallow depth of field. Use natural skin tones, luxury editorial fashion photography, soft highlights, crisp fabric detail, gentle wind in the hair and sari, realistic shadows on the sand, and a high-end dreamy coastal wedding aesthetic. Compose as a 2:3 vertical frame with the woman centered slightly left, full body visible from head to flowing sari hem, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
